name: io.github.geowire/geowire
description: Unified place search for OpenStreetMap, Google & your own data. Fallback, merge, zero API keys.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Enables the Google Maps Platform provider (BYOK). Without it, GeoWire runs OpenStreetMap-only with no key required.

environmentVariables.name: GEOWIRE_INTERNAL_CSV
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Path to a CSV of your own places to register as a priority provider.

environmentVariables.name: GEOWIRE_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Path to a geowire.config.yaml for advanced routing/budget/provider settings.
